name: ui-skills
description: Reverse-engineer any live website into production-ready React + Tailwind code. Reads actual computed CSS, DOM structure, JS interactions, and animations — not just a screenshot. Auto-detects responsive breakpoints via viewport sweep. Verifies output with 60 fps three-capture comparison (static, scroll, interaction). Includes sub-skills for precise animation extraction (WAAPI, canvas/WebGL, scroll-driven JS) and visual baseline capture & comparison with 10x10 cursor-reactive matrix.
